meaning: n.日晒后的颜色,棕褐色,茶色adj.棕褐色的,茶色v.晒黑,晒成褐色
examples: It's safer to fake a tan with make-up rather than subject your complexion to the harsh rays of the sun.
They look best with tan or light brown suits.
She is tall and blonde, with a permanent tan.
"A project like this will give us more confidence to carry out the next project underground, " says Tan.
Mr. RONALD REAGAN (Actor): (As Professor Boyd) Bonzo, you get down before I tan your hide.
